calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael Heath, Esq. appeared for plaintiff M. Dattani Credit Trust.
Kaushik Dattani, owner/principle, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Mayra Arevalo.
Default was entered against defendant on December 28, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 28, 2009.
Declaration of Michael Heath in Support of Application for Entry of Court Judgment was filed today, March 11, 2010.
Declaration of Kaushik Dattani in Support of Application for Entry of Court Judgment was filed today, March 11, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff M. Dattani Credit Trust, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mayra Arevalo as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,919.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $1,355.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $37,099.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
